title: artocarpus longifolius
intro: Artocarpus longifolius, also known as the breadfruit tree, is a species of flowering plant in the mulberry family. It is a large evergreen tree native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Artocarpus longifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, and offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and supporting immune function.
